Very clean.

reviews.comment:
Los baños limpios.
La atención del kiosco y de las empleadas muy buena
La atención en los surtidores muy buena pero una propina empaño todo lo bueno
Recuerdo darle 100 pesos y decirle dame 80 de vuelto y quédate con 20
No sé lo que pasó y se olvidó de darme el vuelto
Llame y se acordó le exprese que pasaría en la semana
Pase y no se acordó
Que se sirva para remedios  muy mala onda

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were clean.
The service at the kiosk and from the employees was very good.
The service at the pumps was very good, but a tip ruined everything.
I remember giving him 100 pesos and telling him to give me 80 pesos back and keep 20. I don't know what happened, but he forgot to give me the change. I called, and he remembered; I told him I would come back during the week. I came by, and he didn't remember. That's a really bad experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwN3V5bWlBRRAB
